payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Partial edge-crop of a dark brown leather sofa with a glossy, slightly worn finish, visible stitched seams and padded vertical-channel back cushions; left armrest and two seat cushions are visible while the right side is cut off — appears approximately 1.2 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"couch","short_description":"dark brown leather couch, partial","long_description":"Partial edge-crop of a dark brown leather sofa with a glossy, slightly worn finish, visible stitched seams and padded vertical-channel back cushions; left armrest and two seat cushions are visible while the right side is cut off — appears approximately 1.2 meters from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown color","leather upholstery","glossy/worn finish","stitched seams","vertical channel back","padded left armrest","visible seat cushions","edge-cropped/right-side cut off"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
